title: telis grandiflora
intro: Telis grandiflora, also known as Telis, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Telis grandiflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications to aid in wound healing.
